page.t: The Allegiance-class Star Destroyer was similar in appearance to both the Victory, Procursator and Imperial-class Star Destroyers, but was larger than all of them, reaching a length of 2,200 meters. Unlike the Victory and the Imperial, the Allegiance-class lacked ventral hangar bays. The terraced dorsal superstructure that surrounded the Allegiance's bridge tower was far smoother than those on the Imperial-class, allowing for better armor coverage and less exposure of the inter-plate surfaces.\n\n{1423090083,9}

A recent discovery of a lost Mandalorian boneyard provided Mandal Hypernautics engineers with an opportunity to bring several Kandosii-class back into service. After a millennia in drydock this cadre of ships had decayed to the point that it was not viable to bring their carrier facilities back to maximum capacity. As such this set of ships has been refitted to serve as a battle focused weapons platform instead.

Compared to a Kandosii-class Dreadnaught, the Kandosii-class Battleship has a larger array of weaponry while having significantly less hangar space. The Kandosii-class Battleship packs a startling number of forward turret firing arcs for a ship of its size.

Mandal Hypernautics engineers, using what they learned on the Keldabe-class project, have brought new life into this venerable hull.

The Secutor-class was 2.2 kilometers long and had two ventral hangar apertures, serving primarily as a carrier. Its length and volume would normally have put it in the battlecruiser-scale of the Anaxes War College System, specifically under Star Cruiser, and it was even given the alternate designation of Secutor-class battlecruiser because of this. However it was lightly armed for its size, and had extensive carrier-capability and was instead designated as a Star Destroyer. This carrier was one of the largest dedicated craft in the Navy.\n\n{1423090083,9}

The Secutor-class was 2.2 kilometers long and had two ventral hangar apertures, serving primarily as a carrier. Its length and volume would normally have put it in the battlecruiser-scale of the Anaxes War College System, specifically under Star Cruiser, and it was even given the alternate designation of Secutor-class battlecruiser because of this. But it was lightly armed for its size, and had extensive carrier-capability and was instead designated as a Star Destroyer. This carrier was one of the largest dedicated craft in the Navy.\n\n{1423090083,9}

The Resurgent-class Star Destroyer, also known as the Resurgent-class Battlecruiser, was an iconic model of battlecruiser and Star Destroyer built by Kuat-Entralla Engineering. Based on the Imperial-class Star Destroyers of the Galactic Empire, it featured advanced weaponry and extreme size.\n\n{1423090083,9}

A rare modification to the already formidable Providence class, the Providence Dreadnaught sees a massive uptick in armament, shielding, and hull plating, allowing to it challenge the ever increasing numbers of Republic Dreadnaughts.\n\n{1423090083,9}

The Sundari-class Dreadnaught is an ancient ship born in the Mandalorian Wars of 3976 BBY. Thought to have been lost to history until a recent Mandalorian exploration party found a mostly intact Sundari-class buried in the swamps of Taris for nearly 4000 years.

The most famous such example was the Akaan Galaar, meaning "War Hawk" in Mando'a, which decimated Old Republic forces in the Battle of Serroco in 3963 BBY.

This dagger-shaped dreadnaught is argued to be the first example of such a design that would continue to be popular for thousands of years, inspiring the Venator-class and Imperial-class Star Destroyers.

Several millennia after the Mandalorian Wars, the Galactic Republic would go on to revive this design and bring it into production as the Veragitor-class Star Destroyer for deployment into the Clone Wars.

The Sundari-class would later lend its name to Sundari, the last capital city of Mandalore.

{1423090083,5}

{1423090083,2}

Originally under the command of Admiral Gaen Drommel of the Galactic Empire, The Guardian is an Executor-class Star Dreadnaught that was stationed near Coruscant when news of the Battle of Endor arrived.

After a series of attacks on New Republic worlds and bases, the tide turned for Drommel, and the Guardian was badly damaged at the Battle of Tantive V in 4 ABY. Drommel fled into hyperspace, but due to the damage sustained on the vessel's hyperdrive, the Guardian emerged in the Fardon system rather than its intended destination. Its hyperdrive inoperable, it went into orbit around the planet Soullex, where it would stay for over a decade as Drommel conducted repairs.

Around 16 ABY the New Republic found and surrounded Admiral Drommel who refused to surrender, but his officer Colonel Niovi shot him and took command of the vessel, surrendering it to the New Republic.

\033YThis ship is one-of-a-kind and its blueprint cannot be obtained.\033X
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Titan-class Star Destroyer.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Eclipse-class Super Star Destroyer.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Viscount-class Star Defender.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Strident-class Star Defender.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Allegiance-class Star Destroyer.
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Kandosii-class Battleship.
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Secutor-class Star Destroyer.
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Procurator II-class Star Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Harrower II-class Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Mandator II-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
KDY Bellator Mark II Engine Array
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark II.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Mandator III-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
KDY Bellator Mark IIA Engine Array
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark IIA.\n\n{1423090083,2}

Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Resurgent-class Star Destroyer. Built upon lessons learned from decades of Imperial engineering, these engines provide excellent performance for a vessel of its massive size.
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Impellor-class and Compellor-class Star Battlecruisers.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Mandalorian Sundari-class Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Praetor Mark II-class Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Veragitor-class Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator Inquisitor Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
TSM Harrower II Inquisitor Engine Array
Engine array designed specifically for installation on the Harrower II Inquisitor Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
The ANHL-240 is an ultra heavy dual turbolaser turret designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}

The XX-9 heavy turbolaser is a heavy shipboard emplacement weapon produced by the Taim and Bak Corporation. This is the dual-barrel configuration of the larger version commonly seen on various capital ships.

The XX-9-E heavy turbolaser is a heavy shipboard emplacement weapon produced by the Taim and Bak Corporation. This is a variant of the larger dual-barrel configuration specifically designed for installation on the Eclipse-class Super Star Destroyer.

The AC10c Cluster Concussion Missile Launcher is a swarm guided missile launcher designed for use on large capital ships.\n\nAC10c Cluster Concussion Missile Launcher fire in volleys of 10 for each ammunition consumed.
The PXL-4-72 is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries.
The KK-66 is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by BlasTech Industries. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries.
The SX-4-17 is a 175-teraton spherical quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The SX-4-24 is a 240-teraton spherical quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The PXL-4-72-E is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on the Eclipse-class Super Star Destroyer.
The SI-3-17 is a 175-teraton equivalent spherical triple heavy ion cannon turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The SX-1-72 is a 720-teraton spherical heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on the Allegiance-class Battlecruiser as its primary anti-capital batteries.
The PXL-4-17 is a 175-teraton quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The PXL-4-24 is a 240-teraton quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.

The W-114T is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries. Has a lower damage output than other 720TT Heavy Quad Turbolasers but has the longest maximum range.
Heavy Quad FLAK turret designed for installation on various capital ships. Used as area anti-starfighter defense.

The PXL-2-72 is a 720-teraton dual-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries. Boasts superior range but less damage than 720TT Heavy Quad Turbolasers.
The DBY-927 is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Taim and Bak Corporation. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries.
The SX-4-24 is a 240-teraton spherical quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The SI-3-17 is a 175-teraton equivalent spherical triple heavy ion cannon turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The SX-4-17 is a 175-teraton spherical quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.

The PXL-2-72 is a 720-teraton dual-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries. Boasts superior range but less damage than 720TT Heavy Quad Turbolasers.
An upscaled variant of the V-200 manufactured exclusively for the Mandator III. Its damage output is higher but its maximum range is the same as the V-100.
A long range Heavy Turbolaser tuned for the needs of the Mandator III Star Dreadnaught

The MoH-94 is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret designed by a long forgotten Mandalorian shipwright and modernized by MandalMotors.\n\nDesigned for installation on Sundari-class Dreadnaughts.
The Golan Arms Rapid Fire Model #16 is a 3 round burst single-barrel turbolaser mounted in a ball turret for maximum firing angle coverage.
The Golan Arms Defense Station Model #128 is a heavy quad-barrel turbolaser mounted in an heavily armored turret.
The Golan Arms Defense Station Model #200 is an ultra-heavy dual-barrel turbolaser designed to combat even the largest of dreadnaughts.
The PXL-2-24 is a 240-teraton dual heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The PXL-4-74 is a 720-teraton quad-barreled heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on Dreadnaughts as their primary anti-capital batteries.
The ANHL-244 is an ultra heavy dual turbolaser turret designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
The J9-4-17 is a 175-teraton quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The PXL-4-18 is a 175-teraton quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
The J9-4-18 is a 175-teraton quad heavy turbolaser turret manufactured by Kuat Drive Yards. Designed for installation on various capital ships.
Shield dome designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield dome designed specifically for installation on the Titan-class Star Destroyer.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation inside the Eclipse-class Super Star Destroyer.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation inside the Strident-class Star Defender.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield Dome designed specifically for installation on the Allegiance-class Star Destroyer.
Shield Dome designed specifically for installation on the Procurator II-class Star Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation inside the Harrower II-class Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Mandator II-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
XXL Bellator Mark II Shield Generator
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark II.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield dome designed specifically for installation on the Secutor-class Star Destroyer.
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Mandator III-class Star Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
XXL Bellator Mark IIA Shield Generator
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark IIA.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Compellor-class Star Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Shield generator designed specifically for installation on the Impellor-class Star Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}
Primary Golan IV Shield Generators - these generators protect the L turrets and Siege Turrets.
Secondary Golan IV Shield Generators - these generators protect the XL turrets.
Shield dome designed specifically for installation on the Annihilator-class Inquisitor Dreadnaught.\n\n{1423090083,2}
XL Harrower II Inquisitor Shield Generator
Shield generator designed specifically for installation inside the Harrower II-class Inquisitor Battlecruiser.\n\n{1423090083,2}

The most important development in the design of the Eclipse was its main weapon, a concealed superlaser running along the spine of the ship. Based on the technology of the Death Star, the Eclipse's single superlaser could fire at two-thirds the power of one of the Death Star's superlaser components.\n\n{1423090083,2}
The component beams of the Eclipse's Superlaser located along the edges of the ship.\n\n{1423090083,2}
The component beams of the Eclipse's Superlaser located along the top middle of the ship.\n\n{1423090083,2}
The AC10c is a concussion missile launched in volleys of 10 per ammunition consumed. Best used against other capital ships.\n\nInflicts high damage, but has low shield penetration.
Golan IV XL Heavy Proton Launcher
An XL Long Range Anti-Dreadnaught Proton Launcher.
Golan IV XL Heavy Proton Torpedo
An XL Long Range Anti-Dreadnaught Proton Torpedo.\n\nSupports production via Universal, Sith, or Closed Loop build methods.
This is a dual L/XL/XXL hammerhead shaped pier.
Golan IV docking location for 4 M class ships.
This facility provides a Golan IV Defence Platform with 3 million cubic meters of storage for the base operations, as well as a fleets resupply requirements.
This facility provides a Golan IV Defence Platform with the required living space to hold 750 crew, for base operations, as well as ship crew resupply.
Golan IV docking location for 16 S class ships.

This facility provides a Golan IV Defence Platform with upgrade and resupply services for any class ships it has available docking bays for; S, M, L, XL, or XXL depending on which docks are installed on the station.

This module counts as all 3 types of equipment docks for the purposes of Maintenance when on a Golan IV with a Golan 2-Dock XXL Pier installed.

This module has no docking capabilities on its own.

This module can service five ships at a time.

Extremely advanced miniaturization techniques make this module incredibly potent and incredibly expensive.

{1423090083,1}

The Golan III is a defence platform manufactured by Golan Arms.

Built as a more powerful successor to the Golan II, the Golan III was larger and better armed.

Golan III platforms were assigned to the most valuable locations in the galaxy. One notable use of Golan III platforms was their deployment as scanner stations in the Byss Security Zone, working in concert with Allegiance-class battlecruisers.

Multiple Golan IIIs formed part of the Coruscant's Defense Fleet during the Imperial Period. Many of them would be destroyed when the New Republic took Coruscant from Director Ysanne Isard.

They were also stationed above many other valuable worlds, such as Zhar system, Coruscant and Muunilinst, remaining in use through the end of the Yuuzhan Vong War and beyond.

DIFFICULTY: Advanced
*Everyone hates you.*
*Maintenance is active immediately.*

You are a high ranking Inquisitor of the Imperial Ascendancy with a sizable fleet under your command, of which the flagship is the Extirpator - one of the few Procurator II-class Battlecruisers in the Ascendancy Navy.

The Ascendancy obtained intelligence that the blueprints for the Empire's Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught were currently on a shipyard in Rakata Prime - you were tasked with the secret mission of obtaining them by any means necessary.

However, the Empire somehow knew you were coming - and as you were traveling through Jakku on the final approach to Rakata Prime an Empire fleet came out of hyperspace right on your fleet's position!
In the ensuing battle both fleets sustained heavy losses, but the Extirpator is barely hanging on with many primary shield generators and weapon systems destroyed. The Ascendancy has deemed the mission a failure and abandoned you to your fate.

Who betrayed you? Was it all a setup? You've got to make it out alive to earn back your place, or get your revenge.
Extirpator with fighter wing\nEnforcer and Kontos

You are a high ranking Inquisitor of the Imperial Ascendancy with a sizable fleet under your command, of which the flagship is the Extirpator - one of the few Procurator II-class Battlecruisers in the Ascendancy Navy. The Ascendancy obtained intelligence that the blueprints for the Empire's Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught were currently on a shipyard in Rakata Prime - you were tasked with the secret mission of obtaining them by any means necessary. However, the Empire somehow knew you were coming - and as you were traveling through Jakku on the final approach to Rakata Prime an Empire fleet came out of hyperspace right on your fleet's position! In the ensuing battle both fleets sustained heavy losses, but the Extirpator is barely hanging on with many primary shield generators and weapon systems destroyed. The Ascendancy has deemed the mission a failure and abandoned you to your fate. Who betrayed you? Was it all a setup? You've got to make it out alive to earn back your place, or get your revenge.

*SHOWCASE*
Spawns all ships currently implemented in the Dreadnaughts and Battlecruisers submod.

Several Rebel and Imperial ships are present for target practice.

Allows construction of the Mandator II-class Dreadnaught as well as required systems.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, primary shield generator, and primary weapon.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

Also includes schematics for the Clone Era, Imperial, and Mandalorian variants.

{1423090083,4} of each variant

Allows construction of the Annihilator-class Dreadnaught as well as all required systems.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, primary shield generator, and primary weapon.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,4}

Allows construction of the Strident-class Star Defender as well as all required systems.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold primarily by the New Republic.

{1423090083,5}

Allows construction of the Titan-class Star Destroyer as well as all required systems.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold primarily by the Ascendancy.

{1423090083,7}
An old data cube dating back to the Clone Wars.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and allow us to research Republic Navy ships.

A data cube that was salvaged from an Ascendancy Star Destroyer.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and allow us to research Ascendancy capital ships.

A data cube that was salvaged from a New Republic research vessel.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and allow us to research New Republic and Mon Calamari capital ships.
A heavily encrypted data cube containing highly classified information pertaining to how to manufacturer durasteel and quadranium alloy infused superstructures.
Further decryption of the data cube reveals plans for a miniaturized death star reactor core.
Further decrypting revealed data on how to focus Kyber crystals for potential use in laser focusing.

Fully decrypting the data cube has revealed blueprints for the Eclipse-class Super Star Destroyer.

This will allow us to construct and maintain this extremely powerful ship.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, primary shield generator, and primary weapon.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Galactic Empire and Kuat.

{1423090083,4}

Having been recently captured by Wedge Antilles, the Lusankya is in extremely rough shape, allocating funds to this project will allow us to construct and maintain her in our own shipyards.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

{1423090083,4}

Allows construction of the Mandator III-class Dreadnaught, as well as all required systems.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,4}

A data cube purchased from Kuat Drive Yards detailing the evolution and design philosophies of the Mandator line of Dreadnaughts.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and begin researching branches of the Mandator line.

Allows construction of the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark IIA variant, as well as required subsystems.

The Mark IIA has been constructed in a dark grey color, is 50% larger, and around 25% stronger than a standard Bellator-class.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,4}

Allows construction of the Bellator-class Star Dreadnaught Mark II, as well as required subsystems.

The Mark II is 50% larger and around 25% stronger than a standard Bellator-class.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,4}

A data cube purchased from Moff Hadfol himself.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and to begin to research the Compellor-class and Impellor-class Battlecruisers.

Allows construction of the Compellor-class Star Battlecruiser.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,5}

Allows construction of the Impellor-class Star Battlecruiser.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,5}

Allows construction of the Praetor Mark II-class Battlecruiser.

The Praetor Mark II-class is an Imperial modernization of the Clone Wars Era Praetor-class.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Imperial factions.

{1423090083,6}

A data cube stolen from an Imperial Research Facility.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and allow us to research Galactic Empire capital ships.

A data cube purchased from Kuat Drive Yards detailing proposed philosophical changes to the Mandator line of Dreadnaughts.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and begin researching a divergent branch of the Mandator line.

A data cube found aboard a recently discovered wreck from the Mandalorian Wars of 3976 BBY.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and begin researching the ability to produce modernized ancient Mandalorian designs.

Allows construction of the Sundari-class Dreadnaught.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary weapon.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by Mandalorian Death Watch.

{1423090083,5}

Allows construction of the Veragitor-class Battlecruiser.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary weapon.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by Kamino.

{1423090083,5}

Spies have discovered a data cube in an office previously used by Ruggle Schmong in a Quarren Free Dac Volunteers Engineering Corps facility detailing the designs of several CIS warships.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to build the infrastructure required to construct XXL class ships and begin researching the ability to produce CIS warship designs.

A data cache containing classified information on the Sith Inquisitorial fleet's operations and strategies.\n\nDecrypting this will allow us to produce Inquisitorial designs, including the Harrower II-class Inquisitor Battlecruiser \(Limit 4\) and Annihilator-class Inquisitor Dreadnaught \(Limit 1\), along with their mandatory equipment.

Captain,

As a reward for our continued allegiance to the Sith Empire, they have provided us with an Inquisitorial Data Cache.

This is sure to contain valuable research material!

Allows construction of the Lucrehulk Battleship.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull and engines.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the Independent Commerce Guild and most other factions.

{1423090083,3}
WARNING: A significant number of inbound hyperdrive signatures detected near that hulk!
WARNING: Gravity well projector detected!! Engines are malfunctioning!!
WARNING: It was a trap!! They've ambushed our marines attempting to board and the survivors are fleeing!
WARNING: Unusual gravitational fluctuations detected near that wreckage!
Incoming Transmission: You didn't think it would be this easy did you?
Incoming Transmission: You should have stuck to the shipping lanes pilot... the Black Sun rule these shadows.

Golan Arms is a weapons manufacturing company, producer of such weapons as the FC-1 flechette launcher and the DF-9.

Golan Arms also produces heavily-armed space stations that are deployed throughout the galaxy. The Golan I, II, and III-class of defense platform allow customers a wide range of options based on their budget.

Golan Arms was a top artillery manufacturer for the Empire, but fell out of favor with the Imperial Army's bureaucracy. On the brink of failure, they would soon join the Rebel Alliance. This led the company to become one of the biggest contributors to the New Republic's military forces
Captain, there are a significant number of inbound hyperdrive signatures detected near that hulk!
Gravity well projector detected!! Engines are malfunctioning!!
It was a trap!! They've ambushed our marines and the survivors are fleeing!
Captain, there are unusual gravitational fluctuations detected near that wreckage!
You didn't think it would be this easy did you?
You should have stuck to the shipping lanes pilot... the Black Sun rule these shadows.
\033YThis module is unaffected by EMP bombs and cannot be hacked to learn its blueprint.\033X
\033YThis blueprint cannot be stolen by diplomatic action.\033X

Allows construction of the Praetor-class Battlecruiser.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull and engines.

Compatible weapons, primary shields, and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

{1423090083,6}
Allows for the construction of XXL fabrication facilities, capable of building and docking the largest warships.

Allows construction of the Prototype Super Star Destroyer.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

{1423090083,4}

Allows construction of the Executor-class Super Star Destroyer.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

{1423090083,4}

Allows construction of the Bellator-class Dreadnaught.

The Bellator-class dreadnaught was a design based on the Mandator II-class. It diverged from its predecessors by being shorter and faster.

This design was referred to in the Imperial Military as a "fast dreadnaught."

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by most major factions.

{1423090083,5}

Allows construction of the Subjugator-class Battlecruiser.

The Subjugator-class was a type of dreadnaught designed by Ruggle Schmong for use by the Confederacy of Independent Systems' naval forces from a discarded SoroSuub Corporation starship design. Potentially the largest warship that served at the time of the Clone Wars, the Subjugator-class was heavily armed with countless laser cannons of different types and a pair of mega-ion cannons.

Provides blueprint for this ship's hull, engines, primary weapons, and primary shield generator.

Compatible weapons and secondary shields are sold by the ICG and most other major factions.

{1423090083,5}
